name: Sakeer

skills.name: Firefly Protection
skills.description: Basic Attacks and skills summon fireflies that deal extra damage to enemies and grant vision of them. Periodically heals teammates, or can charge up his Basic Attack to heal himself instead.

skills.name: Mulberry Power
skills.description: Launches and damages enemies in front while summoning fireflies to heal teammates or damage enemies.

skills.name: Ride the Wind
skills.description: Flies to a brush while summoning fireflies that heal teammates or damage enemies.

skills.name: Firefly Fields
skills.description: Summons a brush and can fly into it by using this skill again. The brush summons fireflies over time that heal teammates or damage enemies.

skillsZh.name: 螢火庇護
skillsZh.description: 桑啟普攻或施放技能時會召喚螢火蟲，對敵人造成額外傷害並獲得其視野。桑啟會定時治療友方英雄，蓄力可治療自身。

skillsZh.name: 桑木為引
skillsZh.description: 桑啟擊飛前方敵人並造成傷害，召喚螢火蟲治療友軍，並對敵人造成傷害。

skillsZh.name: 乘風啟程
skillsZh.description: 桑啟位移至草叢，同時召喚螢火蟲治療友軍，對敵人則造成傷害。

skillsZh.name: 螢火微光
skillsZh.description: 桑啟召喚草叢，再次施放技能會飛至草叢，草叢會持續召喚螢火蟲治療友軍，並對敵人造成傷害。

tips: Build: Overlord's Platemail, Venomous Staff, Ominous Premonition.
tipsZh: 桑啟（遊走）：梯度 B，勝率 53.56%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：霸者重裝、夢魘之牙、不祥徵兆.

patchHistory.detail: "Sakeer has performed exceptionally well since his release. We have moderately nerfed him to ensure a better experience for opponents."

patchHistoryZh.detail: 「桑啟上線後表現過於亮眼，我們將其適度削弱，以保證對手擁有良好的對抗體驗。」

faqs.question: Is Sakeer good in current season?
faqs.answer: Sakeer is Tier B Support with 53.56% win rate, 0.49% pick rate, and 0.02% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Sakeer build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Overlord's Platemail, Venomous Staff, Ominous Premonition, Splendor, Sage's Sanctuary, Destiny.

faqs.question: How to counter Sakeer?
faqs.answer: Pick Haya. Strong into Ying, Luna.

faqsZh.question: 桑啟 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 桑啟 為 B 梯度，勝率 53.56%、選取 0.49%、禁用 0.02%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 桑啟 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：霸者重裝、夢魘之牙、不祥徵兆、輝月、賢者的庇護、名刀・司命.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 桑啟？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Haya。桑啟 克制 Ying、Luna。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Ying, Luna. Weak into: Haya.

guide.overview: Sakeer is a Easy Support (Roaming) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 53.3% win rate and 0.5% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Sakeer: Basic Attacks and skills summon fireflies that deal extra damage to enemies and grant vision of them.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of the Arcane, Overlord's Platemail, Breakthrough Robe, then complete Augur's Word, Frozen Breath. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Fate for stats that match Sakeer's Support kit. Take Smite & Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Mulberry Power → Ride the Wind → Firefly Fields → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Firefly Fields (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Mulberry Power, and Firefly Fields on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Mulberry Power → Ride the Wind → Firefly Fields → weave basic attacks

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Help marksman crash wave, then rotate mid for picks. Return before Tyrant if your carry has no escape.
guide.teamfight: Peel carry first, then look for pick on out-of-position enemies. Ward Tyrant 30s before spawn.
guide.highRank: Sakeer sits at Tier B globally (53.3% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick. Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.
comparisons: Sakeer vs Dolia (Support, Tier S): Dolia is 1.8% pick / 46.1% WR. Sakeer has +7.2% WR vs Dolia in Camp data. Choose Sakeer when you need Roaming identity; choose Dolia for Roaming comfort.
Sakeer vs Cai Yan (Support, Tier S): Cai Yan is 1.3% pick / 50.3% WR. Sakeer has +3.0% WR vs Cai Yan in Camp data. Choose Sakeer when you need Roaming identity; choose Cai Yan for Roaming comfort.

matchups.summary: Sakeer excels into Ying, Luna. Avoid blind picking into Haya, Zilong, Butterfly without team peel.
